since_last: 67% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +6.32%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.88% · BTC -2.67% · Gold +0.40% · Nasdaq100 +1.81%. 67% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +6.32%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +6.32%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +29.47%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +29.47%, AVAV +20.38%, CEVA +11.39%, KLAC +9.54%, VRT +8.79%. Laggards: DLR -4.92%, HON -4.75%, TLN -4.74%, PINS -4.52%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +4.18% at $171.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +4.18% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
